case_title: ZEIDAN, SULEIMAN vs. WONG, KARL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZEIDAN, SULEIMAN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KARL DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED
